tagline: Yotel — tech-forward urban + airport micro-hotels (global footprint)

hotels.name: YOTEL New York Times Square
hotels.notes: Brand's first city hotel; opened June 13, 2011 in MiMA tower, Hell's Kitchen / Times Square West. 170 sq ft cabins.

hotels.name: YOTEL Boston Seaport
hotels.notes: Seaport District; cabins range 152-487 sq ft; rooftop bar.

hotels.name: YOTEL Washington DC
hotels.notes: Capitol Hill; conversion of former Liaison Washington Capitol Hill. Opened February 1, 2021.

hotels.name: YOTEL San Francisco
hotels.notes: Mid-Market / SoMa; adaptive reuse of historic Grant Building. ~120 sq ft micro-rooms.

hotels.name: YOTEL + YOTELPAD Miami
hotels.notes: Downtown Miami; first combined Yotel + YotelPad concept globally. 222 hotel cabins + 231 YotelPad residences. Opened June 1, 2022.

hotels.name: YOTELPAD Park City
hotels.notes: Canyons Village at Park City Mountain Resort; first YotelPad worldwide. Opened December 17, 2020. Studio to 3BR PADs.

hotels.name: YOTEL + YOTELPAD Atlanta
hotels.address: Underground Atlanta, Block One (Pryor St & Upper Alabama St)
hotels.notes: Announced 2019 as 234 Yotel + 117 YotelPad combined property at Underground Atlanta redevelopment. Originally slated 2022, repeatedly delayed. Address approximated to Block One site; exact street # unverified. Construction/opening status as of mid-2026 unconfirmed.

hotels.name: YOTEL London City
hotels.notes: Clerkenwell; brand's first London city hotel. Near Farringdon Station.

hotels.name: YOTELPAD London Stratford
hotels.notes: First YotelPad in Europe. Studios with kitchenettes; heated floors. Newham district, near Stratford Tube.

hotels.name: YOTEL Edinburgh
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Scotland. 5 min walk to Princes Street. Office building conversion.

hotels.name: YOTEL Glasgow
hotels.notes: Opened May 2021. Office-to-hotel conversion opposite Glasgow Central Station.

hotels.name: YOTEL Manchester Deansgate
hotels.notes: Rebrand of Qbic Manchester completed Q1 2022; first Yotel UK franchise. Ground-floor MOTLEY restaurant. 15-26 sqm cabins.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR London Gatwick
hotels.address: Arrivals Concourse, South Terminal, London Gatwick Airport
hotels.notes: Brand's first ever property worldwide. Landside, South Terminal. Bookable by the hour.

hotels.name: YOTEL Amsterdam
hotels.notes: Amsterdam Noord. First Yotel in the Netherlands. Opened November 2019.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Amsterdam Schiphol
hotels.address: Vertrekpassage 118, Schiphol Airport (airside, Lounge 2 near Pier D)
hotels.notes: Airside transit hotel. Requires onward boarding pass. Opening year reported as 2008 or 2009 by different sources.

hotels.name: YOTEL Porto
hotels.notes: Opened 28 May 2021. Porto city centre.

hotels.name: YOTEL Geneva Lake
hotels.notes: Opened April 2024. Located in Founex on Lake Geneva, ~15 km from Geneva city centre, ~15 min drive from Geneva Airport. HVGGE Nordic-inspired restaurant + rooftop bar.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Paris Charles de Gaulle
hotels.notes: Opened November 2016. Airside transit hotel in Terminal 2E satellite L. Some sources cite 76 cabins; 80 is the figure on yotel.com.

hotels.name: YOTEL Istanbul Airport (Landside)
hotels.address: Departures floor, near entrance 7, Istanbul Airport (IST)
hotels.notes: Landside, accessible without boarding pass. Part of Istanbul Airport combined Yotel property (171 landside + 280 airside = 451 cabins total, largest airport hotel in Europe).

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Istanbul Airport (Airside)
hotels.address: Duty Free zone, airside, Istanbul Airport (IST), Terminal Caddesi No:1
hotels.notes: Airside transit hotel. Requires international boarding pass. Sister property to Yotel Istanbul Airport Landside.

hotels.name: YOTEL Singapore Orchard Road
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Asia. 30 floors. Robot delivery droids. Rooftop pool.

hotels.name: YOTELAIR Singapore Changi Airport
hotels.notes: Opened 12 April 2019. First YotelAir in Asia. Inside Jewel Changi (landside / public, 4th floor).

hotels.name: YOTEL Tokyo Ginza
hotels.notes: Grand opened June 2025. Brand's first hotel in Japan. Ginza / Shimbashi.

hotels.name: YOTEL Dubai Business Bay
hotels.address: Sheikh Zayed Road, Business Bay (39-storey tower near Business Bay Metro)
hotels.notes: Building completed Sep 2020 as YOTEL Dubai Business Bay (438 hotel cabins + 127 YotelPad serviced apartments, ~582 keys design); delisted from yotel.com's locations page; the canonical /hotels/yotel-dubai-downtown URL now redirects to a login wall. Booking.com Business Bay listings (as of 2026-05-12) do not include a Yotel-branded property, while sister Dubai brands (Renaissance, Grand Millennium, DoubleTree, Sonder, Embassy Suites, etc.) are all listed. No trade-press de-flag announcement located. Current brand affiliation unconfirmed as of 2026-05-12 — kept on the map as a possible quiet de-flag worth tracking.

hotels.name: YOTEL Belfast
hotels.notes: New-build at Shaftesbury Square. Slated to open late 2026. First Yotel in Northern Ireland. Operated by Andras House Hotels.

hotels.name: YOTEL Bangkok Sukhumvit
hotels.address: Cloud 11, Sukhumvit Road (300m skywalk from BTS Punnawithi; near BTS Udomsuk)
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Thailand. Inside Cloud 11 mixed-use creator-economy hub in South Sukhumvit. 23rd-floor sky bar with views over Bang Krachao. Cloud 11 connects via 300m skywalk to BTS Punnawithi. Listed under operating hotels on yotel.com; opening announcement targeted May 2026 (within Cloud 11's 2026 rollout). Exact street # within Cloud 11 not yet published.

hotels.name: YOTEL Kuala Lumpur
hotels.address: KLCC / Golden Triangle (near Petronas Towers, KL Convention Centre, Bukit Bintang)
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Malaysia. KLCC district, walking distance to Petronas Towers and KL Convention Centre. Robotic concierge, motorised SmartBeds, rooftop pool and bar. Listed under operating hotels on yotel.com. Original target was summer 2025 opening; exact street # within KLCC mixed-use development not yet published in Yotel materials reviewed.

hotels.name: YOTELPAD Athens — Grea Iras Apartments
hotels.notes: First Yotel project in Greece, marketed as YOTELPAD (aparthotel). 113 PADs spread across three centrally-located buildings: Iras in Neos Kosmos (lead address, residential / extended-stay with Acropolis views), Miltiadou near Monastiraki / Syntagma, and Peiraios (flagship building) in Omonoia with rooftop terrace. Slated to open Q4 2026. Exact street # for Iras not yet published in Yotel materials reviewed.

hotels.name: YOTEL Lisbon
hotels.notes: Announced as part of Yotel's European pipeline. Exact address, room count, and developer not publicly disclosed at time of writing.

hotels.name: YOTEL NEOM Oxagon
hotels.notes: First Yotel in Saudi Arabia; first hotel announced in Oxagon (floating industrial city within NEOM). Exact street address not yet published.
